meaning: adj.说话粗鄙恶劣的,使用低级粗俗语言的,嘴损的,下流的
examples: Scurrilous and untrue stories were being invented.
Others exchange scurrilous messages by computer and telephone.
I shall not reply to such a scurrilous attack upon me; it is beneath contempt.
There must be some restrictions in order to protect citizens and the judiciary from scurrilous attacks.
Both sides will denounce the media as scurrilous when they dislike what it reports.
